items.title: Stablecoin Retail Transfers Break Records in 2025, Hit $5.8B in August
items.description: Retail transfers under $250 are at all-time highs, with BSC and Ethereum mainnet gaining ground as Tron falls, according to a fresh report by CEX.io.

items.title: Visa (NYSE:V): Gauging Valuation After Recent Quiet Momentum and Mixed Short-Term Performance
items.description: Visa (NYSE:V) has been quietly making moves that might catch the eye of investors weighing their next step. Although no headline-grabbing event has driven today’s market action, even subtle shifts in sentiment around a giant like Visa can raise important questions about where the stock is headed. It is worth pausing to ask if these moves merely reflect routine trading or hint at a broader story unfolding under the surface. Looking at the past year, Visa’s price momentum has leaned positive,...
